mapper.select: SELECT item_class_id AS id , item_class_id AS key_id , NULL AS parent_id , NULL AS key_parent_id , item_class_code AS code , item_class_name AS name , NULL AS noUse , NULL AS refMmin , NULL AS refMmax , NULL AS refFmin , NULL AS refFmax , NULL AS refUnit , NULL AS resultUse , NULL AS item_desc , 'class' AS item_type FROM item_class WHERE deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT item_category_id AS id , item_category_id + 10000 AS key_id , item_class_id AS parent_id , item_class_id AS key_parent_id , item_category_code AS code , item_category_name AS name , NULL AS noUse , NULL AS refMmin , NULL AS refMmax , NULL AS refFmin , NULL AS refFmax , NULL AS refUnit , NULL AS resultUse , NULL AS item_desc , 'category' AS item_type FROM item_category WHERE deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT item_id AS id , item_id + 1000000 AS key_id , item_category_id AS parent_id , item_category_id + 10000 AS key_parent_id , item_code AS code , item_name AS name , no_use AS noUse , ref_m_min AS refMmin , ref_m_max AS refMmax , ref_f_min AS refFmin , ref_f_max AS refFmax , ref_unit AS refUnit , result_use AS resultUse , item_desc AS item_desc , 'item' AS item_type FROM item WHERE deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT item_sub_id AS id , item_sub_id + 100000000 AS key_id , item_id AS parent_id , item_id + 1000000 AS key_parent_id , item_sub_code AS code , item_sub_name AS name , no_use AS noUse , ref_m_min AS refMmin , ref_m_max AS refMmax , ref_f_min AS refFmin , ref_f_max AS refFmax , ref_unit AS refUnit , result_use AS resultUse , NULL AS item_desc , 'sub' AS item_type FROM item_sub WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
